meaning: n.{食}(用酒霉菌使之发酵后食用的)印尼豆豉
examples: I'm trying to become the mayor of this place—the best crunchy tempeh salad with daikon in town.
Soy products like tofu, tempeh and fortified soymilk do double duty in this regard, since they provide both calcium and protein.
Sea vegetables and tempeh are not reliable sources.
Good options include peas, beans, lentils, nuts and nut butters, seeds, and soy products including tofu, tempeh, and soy milk or cheese.
Tofu, miso and tempeh are also excellent sources of phyto-estrogens.
